# terrible_azure_azcollection_azure_rm_webappslot (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against
- `name` (String) Unique name of the deployment slot to create or update.
- `resource_group` (String) Name of the resource group to which the resource belongs.
- `webapp_name` (String) Web app name which this deployment slot belongs to.

### Optional

- `app_settings` (String) Configure web app slot application settings. Suboptions are in key value pair format.
- `app_state` (String) Start/Stop/Restart the slot.
- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `auto_swap_slot_name` (String) Used to configure target slot name to auto swap, or disable auto swap. Set it target slot name to auto swap. Set it to False to disable auto slot swap.
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `configuration_source` (String) Source slot to clone configurations from when creating slot. Use webapp's name to refer to the production slot.
- `container_settings` (String) Web app slot container settings.
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `deployment_source` (String) Deployment source for git.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of name→value).
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `frameworks` (String) Set of run time framework settings. Each setting is a dictionary. See https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/app-service/app-service-web-overview for more info.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `location` (String) Resource location. If not set, location from the resource group will be used as default.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `purge_app_settings` (Boolean) Purge any existing application settings. Replace slot application settings with app_settings.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `startup_file` (String) The slot startup file. This only applies for Linux web app slot.
- `state` (String) State of the Web App deployment slot. Use `present` to create or update a  slot and `absent` to delete it.
- `swap` (String) Swap deployment slots of a web app.
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
